---
title: Sample Deployment Checklist
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
---

## At home base:

- [ ] Wipe SD Card
- [ ] Check battery voltage and current with multimeter or charger
- [ ] Make sure sensors are showing up on serial monitor: test salinity, turbidity, pressure
- [ ] Test waterproofing in freshwater bucket (w/o electronics!)

## At site

- [ ] Plug in battery
- [ ] Seal lid
- [ ] Make sure sensors are showing up on serial monitor: test salinity, turbidity, pressure
- [ ] Place in water so that all three sensors are submerged
- [ ] Record phone GPS location using GPS app
- [ ] Move measurement to multiple target depths and sites
- [ ] Repeat every three hours

## Recovery

- [ ] Remove sensors from water -- CAREFUL not to disturb pressure port
- [ ] Drain water from frame
- [ ] Towel off excess water
- [ ] Open payload
- [ ] Press user switch to stop logging
- [ ] Remove SD card
- [ ] Quick check of data with verify.m
